title: pelargonium × augustissimum
intro: Pelargonium × augustissimum, also known as August Beauty or Royal Captivation, is a hybrid of the pelargonium plant species, commonly used in herbal medicine. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and combat bacterial infections. The health benefits of Pelargonium × augustissimum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, such as sore throats and congestion, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
